narrative:
Wayne Township (precinct in Adams County) has 866 registered voters, with 41.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.3 percentage points.
